allow: Bash(git commit -m 'Initial commit — YVR Advanced Image Viewer foundation *)
Bash(venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pip install PyQt6 opencv-python numpy scipy tifffile imageio pyqtgraph Pillow PyOpenGL PyOpenGL_accelerate)
Bash(venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import PyQt6; import cv2; import numpy; import pyqtgraph; import OpenGL; print\('All imports OK'\)")

Bash(venv/Scripts/pyinstaller --noconfirm --windowed --name "VyuhaAI_ImageViewer" --add-data "resources;resources" --add-data "src;src" --hidden-import PyQt6.QtOpenGL --hidden-import PyQt6.QtOpenGLWidgets --hidden-import pyqtgraph --hidden-import cv2 --hidden-import tifffile --hidden-import imageio --hidden-import pywt --hidden-import skimage main.py)
Bash(venv/Scripts/python -c "from PIL import Image; img=Image.open\('resources/icons/logo.ico'\); print\('ICO OK, sizes:', img.info.get\('sizes','unknown'\)\)")
Bash(venv/Scripts/python -c "from src.ui.dialogs.batch_dialog import BatchDialog; print\('BatchDialog import OK'\)")
Bash(venv/Scripts/python -c "from src.ui.panels.inspector_panel import InspectorPanel; from src.ui.main_window import MainWindow; print\('OK'\)")
Bash(python -c "import ast; ast.parse\(open\('src/ui/main_window.py', encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\); print\('Syntax OK'\)")
